description: Architectural layers of the MossyMesh product (MessyMash blueprint).

layers.name: Frontend Layer
layers.implementation: Offline-first PWA via captive portal; nginx client_max_body_size 150M for asset transfers.

layers.name: Application Logic / Engine
layers.implementation: Core chess bitboard evaluation, memory-mapped endgame tablebases, YATA CRDT conflict-free replication. Deterministic WASM exports (evaluate_move, get_best_move).

layers.name: Execution Sandbox
layers.implementation: Symmetric static INT8 quantization, fixed-block memory pools via wasm_runtime_full_init. MEM_LIMIT = 10 MiB guest heap. Bounded aux stack.

layers.name: Transport Layer
layers.implementation: Identity-based routing (NodeId, not IP/DNS). STUN-less hole punching on heavy links; LoRa CSMA/CA & BLE on light links. VDF-gated JobIds; VRF worker assignment.

layers.name: Ledger Consensus
layers.implementation: Incremental Merkle-Patricia Trie with compact DAG-CBOR and cryptographic pointers. Active ledger ≤ 10 MB on edge.

layers.name: State Compression
layers.implementation: Recursive ZK-SNARK folding over Pallas/Vesta. Constant-sized proofs so old ledger history can be dropped.

layers.name: AI Processing
layers.implementation: Standardized tensor formats, disk-mapped context windows, deterministic GPU compute for high-compute tiers.

supporting.name: Interop Gateway
supporting.implementation: When uplink exists: REST/WS bridge for jobs and liquidity. No cloud DB as sole backend.

supporting.name: Governance & Economy
supporting.implementation: Voucher-based onboarding; 3-of-5 admin multi-sig decays over 90 days.
